Class AbstractNodeFactory

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.AbstractNodeFactory
public abstract class AbstractNodeFactory extends Object
Abstract factory class for creating IMiner instances.

Holds references to the Simulation and Sampler objects, which can be used by subclasses to configure newly created nodes.

Subclasses must implement createNewNode() to provide concrete node creation logic.

  • Field Summary

    Field
    Description
    protected Sampler
    sampler
    The sampler container instance used for generating random behaviors or other sampling.

    • createNewNode

      public abstract INode createNewNode() throws Exception
      Creates a new INode instance.

      Concrete subclasses must implement this method to return a fully initialized node. The creation logic may depend on the simulation and sampler instances provided to the factory.

      Returns:
      a new node instance
      Throws:
      Exception - if node creation fails
